comment: 防盗窗底框小片 (NORTH-authored, 开槽/notched). TWO strips at x4.5-7 and x9-11.5 that AVOID the x7-9 pane core band, so the cap is never coplanar with the pane side/post bottom faces (the real z-fighting source, findings #1). Pulled 1px off the boundary (z from 1), reaching the pane center (z=8) so opposite caps tile along a straight run. CAVEAT: at L/T/X corners perpendicular caps still overlap slightly (findings #2). Multipart rotates per connected side. #top = horizontal face, #all = vertical face; cutout.
